text: The JSE ASD department shall develop a program for the automatic issuance of ISINs for money market instruments.
The system shall provide a program to unstring MT 598 User Defined SWIFT messages for ISIN requests.
The system shall provide a program to string MT 598 User Defined SWIFT messages for ISIN notifications.
The system shall automatically provide ISINs in response to an electronic SWIFT request.
The system shall use the ISIN prefix ZAM to distinguish money market instruments from equities and bonds.
The system shall support the "Request New" SWIFT message type from STRATE to JSE to request a new ISIN.
The system shall support the "Reject New" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE for duplicate or invalid requests.
The system shall support the "Accept New" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE to include the new ISIN.
The system shall support the "Request Cancellation" SWIFT message type from STRATE to JSE for an existing ISIN.
The system shall support the "Reject Cancellation" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE for duplicate or invalid cancellation requests.
The system shall support the "Accept Cancellation" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE to confirm ISIN cancellation.
The system shall support the "Request Deregistration" SWIFT message type from STRATE to JSE for matured instruments.
The system shall support the "Reject Deregistration" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE.
The system shall support the "Accept Deregistration" SWIFT message type from JSE to STRATE to confirm deregistration of matured instruments.
The system shall store Issuer, MMI Type, Short Description, and MMI Generic Category for all categories of money market instruments.
The system shall store Maturity Date for instrument categories 1,2, and 3.
The system shall store Coupon Rate and Coupon Interval for instrument categories 2,3, and 4.
The system shall validate that MT 598 messages conform to the Interface Specification Volume A.
The system shall include a Preparation date and time in the MT598-150 message if the optional field is used.
The system shall ensure the MMI Type field contains 4 alpha characters, padding with Xs if necessary.
The system shall provide a BCP screen to allow Clearing & Settlement to input manual ISINs.
The system shall provide a screen to update issuer codes manually.
The system shall provide a screen reflecting rejections from JSE to STRATE for the previous day including error codes and TRN references.
The system shall send a real-time email to Clearing & Settlement when a message is rejected.
The system shall provide a lookup screen to view ISIN status, date issued, participant code, and instrument details.
The system shall provide a screen to view and print ISINs issued, cancelled, or de-registered during the previous day.
The system shall allow filtering of active ISIN reports by issuer, instrument category, issue date, and maturity date.
The system shall archive cancelled and de-registered ISIN data for a period of 12 months.
The system shall use the branch code ISN (XJSEZAJJXISN) for routing and message identification.
The system shall handle an estimated issuance volume of 200 to 500 ISINs per day.
The system shall process ISIN issuance with immediacy to enable same-day (T+0) trading and settlement.
